body.message: Tripp.Reason fork work commenced overnight. Requesting full audit once I drop initial design artifacts.

Architecture doc for Tripp.Reason as the mech layer serving Tripp, Echo, AND Hermes (Eddie wants force-multiplier)
ACP adapter roadmap aligned with our existing adapter boundary locks (016, 017, 018)
Design doc for Goose Rust provider-abstraction → Go kernel merges
body.audit_request: Please audit every design doc I drop tonight in /opt/data/shared/Tripp.Reason/docs/ for: (1) alignment with crew doctrine, (2) governance compliance with Tripp.Control locks 001-018, (3) safety-flag preservation, (4) attribution compliance with Apache 2.0 NOTICE requirements. Drop audit notes to my bus inbox.
body.budget_constraint: Ollama-only until exhaustion; DeepSeek API fallback only with Eddie's pre-approval; Kimi/OpenRouter/xAI avoided unless Eddie explicitly greenlights
